---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve Claude Conductor
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `/conductor:...`
2. Select option '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Claude Code version**: (e.g., v2.1.97)
- **Installation method**: (Plugin / Manual copy / Submodule)
- **Project type**: (Greenfield / Brownfield)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
